languages.text: {n}Эоганн бледнеет. Он молча открывает рот, не находя ответа. Когда шок сходит, он закрывает органический глаз и морщины разглаживаются.{/n} "Вы правы. Я не могу бежать вечно. Я твержу, что это все ради Нунциуса, но я не только трус, но и отменный лжец. Я думаю только о себе. Выбираю фантома, скрываясь от боли. Пора наконец-то выбрать своего дражайшего коллегу. И... попрощаться".

{n}Eogunn goes pale. He opens his mouth silently, unable to find a response. When the shock wears off, he closes his organic eye and the wrinkles on his face smooth out.{/n} "You are right. I cannot run forever. I keep insisting that this is all for Nuncius, but I am not only a coward, I am a consummate liar. I think only of myself. I choose a phantom to hide from the pain. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн бледнеет. Он молча открывает рот, не находя ответа. Когда шок сходит, он закрывает органический глаз и морщины разглаживаются.{/n} "Вы правы. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn palidece. Abre la boca, pero guarda silencio al no poder responder. Cuando se le pasa la sorpresa, cierra su ojo orgánico y las arrugas de su cara se alisan.{/n} «Tiene razón, no puedo seguir corriendo eternamente. Por mucho que insista en que todo es por Nuncius, además de ser un cobarde soy un mentiroso redomado. Solo pienso en mí mismo. Oculto mi dolor tras ilusiones. Es hora de elegir a mi querido colega por una vez, y... despedirme».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn goes pale. He opens his mouth silently, unable to find a response. When the shock wears off, he closes his organic eye and the wrinkles on his face smooth out.{/n} "You are right. I cannot run forever. I keep insisting that this is all for Nuncius, but I am not only a coward, I am a consummate liar. I think only of myself. I choose a phantom to hide from the pain. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的脸色变得苍白。他默默地张开嘴，却不知如何回应。震惊消退后，他闭上了他有机体的眼睛，脸上的皱纹也抚平了。{/n}“您是对的。我不能永远逃避。我坚持说一切都是为了努恩修斯，可我不仅是个懦夫，更是个彻头彻尾的骗子。我只考虑我自己。我选择用一个幻象来逃避苦痛。现在，是时候面对我最亲爱的同僚，并且……对他说再见了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn goes pale. He opens his mouth silently, unable to find a response. When the shock wears off, he closes his organic eye and the wrinkles on his face smooth out.{/n} "You are right. I cannot run forever. I keep insisting that this is all for Nuncius, but I am not only a coward, I am a consummate liar. I think only of myself. I choose a phantom to hide from the pain. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡的脸色变得苍白。他默默地张开嘴，却不知如何回应。震惊消退后，他闭上了他有机体的眼睛，脸上的皱纹也抚平了。{/n}“您是对的。我不能永远逃避。我坚持说一切都是为了努恩修斯，可我不仅是个懦夫，更是个彻头彻尾的骗子。我只考虑我自己。我选择用一个幻象来逃避苦痛。现在，是时候面对我最亲爱的同僚，并且……对他说再见了。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn blêmit et reste bouche bée, incapable de trouver une réponse. Une fois remis du choc, il ferme son œil organique et les rides de son visage s'estompent.{/n} « Vous avez raison. Je ne peux pas fuir éternellement. Je m'évertue à dire que je fais tout cela pour Nuncius, mais en vérité, je suis un lâche doublé d'un menteur invétéré. Je ne pense qu'à moi. Je choisis un fantôme pour me dérober à la douleur. Il est temps que je choisisse enfin mon très cher collègue et... que je lui fasse mes adieux. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn goes pale. He opens his mouth silently, unable to find a response. When the shock wears off, he closes his organic eye and the wrinkles on his face smooth out.{/n} "You are right. I cannot run forever. I keep insisting that this is all for Nuncius, but I am not only a coward, I am a consummate liar. I think only of myself. I choose a phantom to hide from the pain. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn blêmit et reste bouche bée, incapable de trouver une réponse. Une fois remis du choc, il ferme son œil organique et les rides de son visage s'estompent.{/n} « Vous avez raison. Je ne peux pas fuir éternellement. Je m'évertue à dire que je fais tout cela pour Nuncius, mais en vérité, je suis un lâche doublé d'un menteur invétéré. Je ne pense qu'à moi. Je choisis un fantôme pour me dérober à la douleur. Il est temps que je choisisse enfin mon très cher collègue et... que je lui fasse mes adieux. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un rengi soluyor. Sessizce ağzını açıyor, verecek bir cevap bulamıyor. Şoku atlattığında organik gözünü kapatıyor ve yüzündeki kırışıklıklar düzeliyor.{/n} "Haklısın. Sonsuza dek kaçamam. Her şeyin Nuncius için olduğunda ısrar edip duruyorum ama ben sadece bir korkak değil, aynı zamanda kusursuz bir yalancıyım. Sadece kendimi düşünüyorum. Acıdan saklanmak için bir hayaleti seçiyorum. Nihayet pek değerli meslektaşımı seçme zamanı geldi. Ona... Veda etme zamanı."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn goes pale. He opens his mouth silently, unable to find a response. When the shock wears off, he closes his organic eye and the wrinkles on his face smooth out.{/n} "You are right. I cannot run forever. I keep insisting that this is all for Nuncius, but I am not only a coward, I am a consummate liar. I think only of myself. I choose a phantom to hide from the pain. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."

Sonsuza dek kaçamam. Her şeyin Nuncius için olduğunda ısrar edip duruyorum ama ben sadece bir korkak değil, aynı zamanda kusursuz bir yalancıyım. Sadece kendimi düşünüyorum. Acıdan saklanmak için bir hayaleti seçiyorum. Nihayet pek değerli meslektaşımı seçme zamanı geldi. Ona... Veda etme zamanı."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn erbleicht. Er öffnet lautlos den Mund, findet aber keine Worte. Als der Schock nachlässt, schließt er sein organisches Auge und die Falten auf seinem Gesicht glätten sich.{/n} "Ihr habt recht. Ich kann nicht ewig fliehen. Ich beharre darauf, dass ich das alles für Nuncius mache, aber ich bin nicht nur ein Feigling, sondern auch ein perfekter Lügner. Ich denke nur an mich selbst. Ich entscheide mich für ein Phantom, um dem Schmerz zu entfliehen. Es wird Zeit, mich endlich für meinen geschätzten Kollegen zu entscheiden. Und ... mich zu verabschieden."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn goes pale. He opens his mouth silently, unable to find a response. When the shock wears off, he closes his organic eye and the wrinkles on his face smooth out.{/n} "You are right. I cannot run forever. I keep insisting that this is all for Nuncius, but I am not only a coward, I am a consummate liar. I think only of myself. I choose a phantom to hide from the pain. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."

Ich entscheide mich für ein Phantom, um dem Schmerz zu entfliehen. Es wird Zeit, mich endlich für meinen geschätzten Kollegen zu entscheiden. Und ... mich zu verabschieden."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは青ざめる。無言で口を開き、返答を見つけることができない。ショックが和らぐと、彼は有機眼を閉じ、顔の皺が滑らかになる。{/n}「君の言う通りだ。私は永遠に逃げ続けることはできない。ヌンキウスのためだと言い張るが、私は臆病なだけでなく、完璧な嘘つきだ。自分のことしか考えていない。痛みから逃れるために幻影を選んでいる。ついに愛する同僚を選ぶ時が来た。そして...さよならを言うために」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn goes pale. He opens his mouth silently, unable to find a response. When the shock wears off, he closes his organic eye and the wrinkles on his face smooth out.{/n} "You are right. I cannot run forever. I keep insisting that this is all for Nuncius, but I am not only a coward, I am a consummate liar. I think only of myself. I choose a phantom to hide from the pain. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."
